goal: Pivot from full-surface directional prediction to base-conditional trade-quality overlays (veto, early-cut, hold-extension) that improve immutable base trades without modifying base logic.
global_constraints: Base signal logic (active-signal-v1@1) is immutable — never retune hours, days, thresholds, or execution parameters.
Do NOT re-open full-surface directional classification on leadership/breadth/path-asymmetry/regime features — terminally closed after v4–v7.
Do NOT use CatBoost regression on future PnL — terminally closed.
Do NOT select feature sets, label schemes, horizons, thresholds, or architectures by lockbox window.
Any claimed improvement must pass matched OOS comparison with base on the same trade window.
All work operates on trade-level (executed trades of the base), not on anchor-bar level.
Labels must be frozen before training; thresholds tuned only on selection OOS.
Train/selection-OOS/lockbox-OOS split by trade entry timestamp with purge gap ≥ 24h.
Only one main research branch at a time: veto first, then early-cut, then extension.

slices.title: Ownership, cannibalization и финальный overlay verdict
slices.hypothesis: Compute ownership metrics and cannibalization analysis for every surviving overlay route, render honest final verdict (success/partial/failed), and write closing v8 report.
slices.objective: Compute ownership metrics and cannibalization analysis for every surviving overlay route, render honest final verdict (success/partial/failed), and write closing v8 report.
success_criteria: Ownership computed for every surviving overlay.
Cannibalization analysis complete — no overlap gaming.
Final verdict rendered as one of: success, partial, failed.
Closing v8 report written and recorded in research memory.
evidence_requirements: Ownership computed for every surviving overlay.
Cannibalization analysis complete — no overlap gaming.
Final verdict rendered as one of: success, partial, failed.
Closing v8 report written and recorded in research memory.
